December theme: Reflection, Integration, and Renewal. Today focus on turning experience into wisdom through the Stoic principle of daily review and deliberate improvement.

Review tonight: what went well, what to improve, what to repeat.

Review the day honestly, then choose one better move tomorrow.

Studies on emotional granularity show that labeling feelings precisely improves regulation and reduces reactive behavior.

Marcus would call this returning to reason and the work in front of you.
